title: 2016 Seattle OPA Complaint - 2016OPA-1167 - Post Mortem / Legal Analysis
content:
# 2016 Seattle OPA Complaint - 2016OPA-1167 - Post Mortem / Legal Analysis

## Overview

Analysis of Seattle Office of Police Accountability complaint 2016OPA-1167 and its handling.

## Key Issues Raised

- Police report fabrication
- Excessive bail ($75,000)
- Fourth Amendment violations
- Failure to investigate exculpatory evidence
- Coordination with accuser

## OPA Process Failures

- Inadequate investigation
- Failure to interview key witnesses
- Dismissal without proper review
- Lack of accountability

## Legal Implications

- Evidence for Section 1983 claims
- Pattern evidence for Monell liability
- Basis for federal civil rights complaint
